description.value: You create a rushing torrent of water in the rough outline of a shield. The water protects you from one physical or fire attack, granting you DR /â and fire resistance equal to half your caster level (minimum 1) on that attack. Once the spell has reduced the damage of one attack against you, it is discharged.
